resources.string: Application developed by [Abraham C]. Version 1.0 >> Lie.. version 30.1 at least.. and I sometimes watch Pikmin

Red Pikmin are characterized by their scarlet bodies and pointed noses. In addition to the plant-like traits of their species, they have animal characteristics such as a strong fighting spirit and a high degree of curiosity. They have great adaptability, as they are not only resistant to extreme heat, but also inhabit a wide variety of ecosystems.

They are characterized by their yellow bodies and a pair of ear-like lamellae that allow them to dig quickly and reach great heights when thrown. Another distinguishing trait is their bodies ability to conduct electricity. They are not only resistant to it, but seem to enjoy it.
Electricity resistance, High flight ability, Excellent diggers

They are characterized by their blue bodies and inscrutable facial expressions. Unlike most other rambulatory species, which cannot breathe underwater, Blue Pikmin have gills that resemble a mouth. These gills allow them to survive in both aquatic and terrestrial ecosystems.

They are characterized by their white bodies and red eyes. Their small bodies secrete a potent venom, which makes them immune to certain poisons. White Pikmin seeds can be obtained through ivory bouncing sprouts that only grow in underground regions.

They are characterized by their robust and strong bodies. They are bigger and stronger than the rest of their species. They weigh 10 times more than any other Pikmin. Like White Pikmin, they can only be born from bouncing sprouts found exclusively in underground regions, making them a unique species.
Weight, Great carrying capacity, Born underground
They are a parasitic type of Pikmin called "Ermikmin" that takes a stone as a host, and similar to a seed rooting through rock cracks, the Pikmin’s roots penetrate the stone.
They are characterized by their pink bodies and prominent blue eyes that look like lenses. They move gracefully through the air with their wings, but their attacks do not deal much damage.

They belong to a parasitic subtype of Pikmin called "Ermikmin". They obtain and maintain their bodies through a process that constantly generates new ice from ambient moisture using their low-temperature core.

They are characterized by their radiant green bodies. When the leaf on their head blooms, it takes the shape of a star. They have several traits that distinguish them from other Pikmin types, one being that instead of sprouting from onions, they sprout from lumilomas which only appear at night and in underground regions.
No feet and float in the air. Immune to many elements that affect other Pikmin types, Active at night and underground, Unusual behavior.
